title: banisteria suberosa
intro: Banisteria suberosa, also known as the balata tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to Central and South America. The bark of the Banisteria suberosa plant contains a resin called balata, which has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Banisteria suberosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be made by steeping the bark in hot water or using a solvent to extract the balata resin.
